creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to fcsk.aim from comment #5)
As i told i didn't made MySQL includes :D MySQL developers did :D
and they developed mysql_config for solving this and offered in Docs to use it for C-Flags and includes :D
I can not change these includes for this special reason as many ports that based on MySQL are assuming this (because MySQL developers and Docs suggested).

Using mysql_config or adding -I didn't solve you problem ?

Thanks, Mokhi :D
